name: Spaghetti & Meatballs

ingredients.item: can San Marzano tomatoes plus one can of water

method: In a medium-sized bowl, combine ground beef, egg, breadcrumbs, and cheese. Add parsley, salt, pepper, and oregano, and mix with hands. Form 1.5-inch round balls and set aside on a plate. In a large frying pan on medium heat, add 1 T olive oil. Saute meatballs until evenly browned, they don't have to be cooked through because they will cook in the sauce. Remove from pan and set aside.

In a frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T olive oil and fry onion until lightly browned. Add tomatoes and 1 can of water. If you want to be fancy you can add ½ cup of red wine or substitute water for beef broth. Add crushed garlic, basil leaves, salt, and pepper. If you like other spices like oregano you can also add those to the sauce- it’s up to you! Add meatballs and simmer on low uncovered for an hour, check every 15 minutes, add water when needed and stir. Boil salted water for pasta and add 450 grams of spaghetti (1 package). Cook until al dente. Drain and add pasta to meatballs and sauce that has been simmering in the sauce. Mix until combined and then manticare well. Top with grated parmesan or pecorino. Serves 4. Serving suggestion: fresh salad and homemade bread. Olé
